name: FluroTech Ltd.
summary: FluroTech Ltd., a technology and marketing company, focuses on the commercialization of various technologies in the cannabis and hemp industries. It engages in the commercialization and sale of CompleTest, a portable cannabis and hemp testing device that provides cannabis and hemp testing results when used with FluroTech's specialty test kits. The company also engages in developing and commercializing a biotracker technology for cannabis and hemp seed to sale tracking. FluroTech Ltd. has a strategic agreement with Alberta BioPhotonics Inc. and Albany Medical College. The company is headquartered in Calgary, Canada.
